subcodes.first_line: O Kamal! Hearken unto that which the Dayspring of Names calleth unto thee from this Most Exalted Horizon: Verily, there is no God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا کمال ان استمع ما ینادیک به مطلع الاسماء من هذا الافق الاعلی انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
